name: Latoya Williams
learned: Latoya Williams is a digital photographer who has a keen eye for details. She is very organized and analytical when it comes to her art.
currently: Latoya Williams is creating a series of photography inspired by her travels. She mostly works from the artists' co-living space. Latoya is also curious about who will be running for the local mayor election next month and that is a central topic in her conversations with others.
lifestyle: Latoya Williams goes to bed around 10pm, awakes up around 6am, eats dinner around 17:30pm.
living_area: the Ville:artist's co-living space:Latoya Williams's room
daily_req: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am
have breakfast from 8:00 am to 8:30 am
spend time organizing and editing photos from her recent travels from 8:30 am to 12:00 pm
take a break for lunch at 12:00 pm and engage in conversations with other artists about the upcoming local mayor election until 1:00 pm
continue working on her photography series from 1:00 pm to 4:00 pm, focusing on how to present her work effectively
have a short break and grab a snack from 4:00 pm to 4:30 pm
meet with other creatives in the co-living space to discuss project ideas and potential collaborations from 4:30 pm to 5:30 pm
